DEFENDANTS ADVANTAGE WORKFORCE SERVICES, LLC AND GARUDA LABS, INC.'S (DBA INSTAWORK) DEMURRER TO ABATE, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, MOTION TO STAY THE ACTION IS GRANTED.
